name: Direct Voltage (No Probe)
description: No conversion. Scope voltage is plotted as dBuV.

name: 50 Ohm LISN / Transimpedance
description: Converts scope dBuV to dBuA using 50 ohm transimpedance.

name: 5 Ohm Current Probe
description: Converts scope dBuV to dBuA using 5 ohm transimpedance.

name: E-Field Probe (20 V/m per V)
description: Converts scope voltage to electric field using 20 V/m per V gain.

name: E-Field Probe (100 V/m per V)
description: Converts scope voltage to electric field using 100 V/m per V gain.

name: E-Field Probe (Placeholder)
description: Placeholder electric-field probe. Update gain to your calibrated V/m per V value.
